name: LiverRaImplausibleOutputReason
title: LiverRa — Implausible Output Reason
description: Structured reason code emitted by LiverRa's end-of-pipeline sanity validator (research §C.7) when an analysis output fails aggregate plausibility checks. Attached to the Observation that carries the implausible measurement so downstream reviewers can triage the root cause.

element.short: Why the sanity validator rejected this output
Reason code from the implausible-output-reason ValueSet

binding.description: Permitted values: sum_mismatch | segment_zero_volume | flr_negative | classification_nonnormal
